title: Use SIDEBAR_NAV_END hook for back link
summary: Decided to place the "← Back to site" link at the end of the Filament sidebar navigation using the SIDEBAR_NAV_END render hook.
recallCue: When adding a persistent back link to the Filament sidebar

title: Add back link to home page in Filament sidebar
summary: Implemented a pinned "← Back to site" link at the bottom of the Filament sidebar that navigates to `/` in the same tab.
recallCue: When confirming the back link has been added
